about.title: About
about.description: Full-stack developer with experience designing and implementing backend services, cloud migrations, and system modernization. Skilled in building APIs, automating workflows, and integrating AI-powered solutions such as OCR and validation systems. Strong focus on performance, security, and maintainable architecture. Experienced in refactoring legacy codebases and establishing cleaner project structures. Motivated by complex technical challenges and scalable system design.

features: Continue driving innovation in Apdata's cloud platform
contributions: Implemented workflow form launch for OCR document reading
Created cadastral validation for CFO (Conselho Federal de Odontologia)
Automated professional credential verification for dentists
Created cadastral validation for CFM (Conselho Federal de Medicina)
Innovation of the web application using the newest tools on the market

thesis.title: Development of a Web Platform to Simplify the Creation of YAML Workflows
thesis.description: The goal of this project was to develop a platform that reduces the difficulties and simplifies the creation of YAML files in an intelligent, guided, and explanatory way. The proposal aimed to especially support beginner developers, offering a more accessible and user-friendly experience while reducing the learning curve.
